features.name: power operator with bit-slice operands
features.description: Code should include a power operator where both base and exponent are 4-bit wire slices extracted from larger vectors, with base and exponent both evaluating to zero

features.name: power operator result assigned to unpacked array slice
features.description: Code should include a power operator result assigned to a 4-bit portion of an unpacked array output, where both operands are zero

features.name: power operator in complex expression with concatenation and xor
features.description: Code should include a power operator between wire values used within a larger expression involving concatenation and xor operations
